data.name: I woke up in the house of a fat man: he's over 30 years old and loves beer and games
data.detailed_description:
迷失在阿爾法斯庫夫的噩夢中

在暴風雨之夜醒來，你發現自己並非躺在自家的床上，而是置身於噩夢的核心：頭痛欲裂，記憶一片空白。一個問題佔據了你的思緒：“我在哪裡？”

這裡是昏暗的燈光、吱呀作響的地板和低語的陰影構成的迷宮，唯一與現實相連的紐帶是一個名叫弗雷德的陌生人，他早已適應這裡的法則，此刻正準備揭示一個駭人的真相：你並非只是迷路了。

你已成為阿爾法斯庫夫宅邸的囚徒，這座“天堂”實則是一個永無止境的坦克遊戲和啤酒狂歡的場所，或許有人會沉溺其中，但你絕不會是其中之一。

遊戲玩法

你必須穿越阿爾法庫夫的宅邸，不斷遭遇重重阻礙。遊戲融合了經典恐怖遊戲的壓迫氛圍和荒誕幽默的元素，讓你在前一刻因恐懼而戰慄，下一刻又因笑聲而忘記所有緊張感。

特色

  • 雙重氛圍：恐怖與荒誕幽默

  • 心理壓迫與絕望感。

  • 令人難忘且神秘莫測的嚮導角色

  • 暗藏諷刺意味的敘事基調。

data.short_description: 逃離被啤酒灌溉的未來！當你在一個陌生之地醒來，頭痛欲裂，這時你才意識到自己已經成為阿爾法庫夫的囚徒。你的未來將是一場永無止境的“坦克與啤酒”的狂歡。若想逃脫，你必須挑戰這個陰鬱迷宮的統治者。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文*, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS 10, 11 (64-BIT Required)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS 10, 11 (64-BIT Required)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: I woke up in the house of a fat man: he's over 30 years old and loves beer and games
data.detailed_description:
Lose yourself in the Alphaskuf nightmare

Wake up after a stormy night to find yourself not in your own bed, but at the heart of a nightmare. Your head is pounding, your memory is blank and one question dominates your thoughts: 'Where am I?'

This place is a maze of dim light, creaking floorboards and whispering shadows. Your only link to reality is a stranger named Fred. He has long since come to terms with his situation. He knows the rules. He is ready to reveal the terrifying truth: you are not just lost.

You have become a prisoner in the abode of the Alphaskuf. Your new 'paradise' is an endless game of tanks and beer madness. Some people might enjoy this kind of life, but you won't.

Gameplay

You must walk through the Alphaskuf's house, constantly encountering obstacles. This game combines the tense atmosphere of classic horror games with extraordinary humour. One moment you will be trembling with fear; the next, you will be laughing so hard that you forget all about the tension.

Features

  • Dual atmosphere: horror and absurd humour

  • Psychological pressure and a sense of hopelessness.

  • A memorable and ambiguous guide character.

  • Satirical undertones.

data.short_description: Escape your beer-fuelled future. After waking up in an unfamiliar place with a pounding headache, you realise that you have become a prisoner of Alfaskuf. Your future is a never-ending game of tanks and beer madness. To escape, you must challenge the master of this gloomy labyrinth.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Japanese
*languages with full audio support

  • Processor: Intel Core i5

  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760
  • Storage: 3 GB available space

Recommended:
